name: Book guest for January 24 episode - grief and resilience theme
notes: Confirmed Rev. Angela Dawson (Golden Heart Medical Center chaplain) for January 24 segment on grief and community resilience. Send confirmation email by Friday.

name: Write script for January 31 episode - spiritual freedom
notes: Pre-recorded New Year gathering episode. Theme: spiritual freedom and the road to liberation. Pull Howard Thurman quotes. Two song breaks: Lauren Daigle and Brandi Carlile.

name: Confirm Covenant Insurance Group sponsor read for January
notes: TJ to confirm Q1 sponsorship renewal with Covenant Insurance Group. Invoice due February 1. Need updated 30-second copy from their team.

name: Segment research - mental health in faith communities
notes: Pull recent Sojourners and Faith and Practice Journal articles. Draft 3 listener questions. Potential guest: Sandra Coles (nursing professor).

name: Finalize 7th anniversary episode plan (radio)
notes: Show launched 2019. Anniversary episode in March 2026. Listener call-in segment, best-of montage, and live music from the Beale Street studio. Coordinate with TJ Jackson.

name: Send invoice to Mitchell's Flowers for January sponsorship
notes: Monthly sponsor invoice. January reads confirmed across four Saturdays. Invoice sent and received per schedule.

name: Review and approve January 20 episode rundown
notes: Theme: Honoring the Fathers of Faith. Segment 1: devotional. Segment 2: community voices. Segment 3: prayer and song. Rundown approved.

name: Plan fall festival emcee outline - Oct 31 Grace Community
notes: Annual trunk-or-treat and fall festival. Rebecca emcees. Draft run-of-show, coordinate with Deacon Mosley on logistics and volunteer assignments.

name: Secure venue and vendor list for health fair
notes: Deacon Mosley coordinating Grace Community Church fellowship hall. Need blood pressure screening table, vision screening, diabetes awareness booth. Confirm Bluff City Community College nursing students can staff.

name: Recruit volunteer sign-ups for health fair
notes: Need 15 volunteers minimum. Sandra Coles connecting us with nursing students. Announce from pulpit Sunday February 1 and post to church bulletin.

name: Design and print health fair flyer
notes: Draft in Canva. Include date, free screenings list, and church address. Print 200 copies for distribution in South Memphis and Midtown.

name: Draft health fair announcement for Morning Reflections
notes: 60-second on-air announcement recorded and aired January 11 and January 16 broadcasts. Call to action: community members to stop by for free health screenings.

name: CPE seminar - grief care in oncology settings
notes: 8 CPE hours. Online via Association of Professional Chaplains. Completed Feb 28. Certificate uploaded to APC portal.

name: CPE workshop - trauma-informed spiritual care
notes: 6 CPE hours. Regional One Health continuing education day. Completed December 6. Running total: 28 of 50 hrs.

name: CPE webinar - end-of-life ethics in ICU settings
notes: 4 CPE hours. APC online webinar series. Registered. Will bring total to 32 hrs. Deadline Dec 31, 2026 - need 22 more after this one.

name: CPE retreat - self-care and compassion fatigue for chaplains
notes: 10 CPE hours. Two-day retreat, Nashville area (Vanderbilt Divinity Center). Discuss with Dr. Lorraine Vickers for employer approval. Would bring total to 42 hrs.

name: CPE conference - APC Annual Conference 2026
notes: 8 CPE hours if attended. Dr. Vickers to confirm if Bluff City Medical Center will fund registration. Would bring total to 50 hrs - satisfies 2026 requirement.

name: Bluff City Auto Care sponsor copy review - January
notes: TJ to send updated sponsor copy from Bluff City Auto Care for January reads. Needs to be in hand by January 22 for Thursday script prep.
